name: auth-fetch-mcp
description: MCP server that fetches authenticated web page content via a real browser. Opens a browser for login, then captures page content as Markdown.

tools.name: auth_fetch
tools.description: Fetches web page content using a real browser with authentication support. Opens a browser window for the user to log in if needed, then captures page content as Markdown.

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: Lists all open tabs in the browser with their URLs and titles.

tools.name: close_browser
tools.description: Closes the browser window. Login sessions are saved and will be reused next time.
